name: Peach Schnapps Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cool Whip with 2 teaspoons peach schnapps (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch bundt pan.
3. CAKE: In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, eggs, orange juice, peach schnapps, and oil. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes. Pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes or until tested done. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
5. Invert the cooled cake onto a serving plate.
6. GLAZE: In a small bowl, combine peach preserves and peach schnapps. Brush glaze over the warm cake.
7. OPTIONAL: Combine Cool Whip with additional peach schnapps. Spoon onto individual slices when served.
